task_completion.description: Verify that assessments mode is enabled for the survey.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the survey settings or survey menu, look for an 'Assessments' toggle or setting set to 'Yes' or 'On'.

task_completion.description: Verify that reverse scoring is applied to questions PSS04, PSS05, PSS07, and PSS08.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the answer options or assessment values for questions PSS04, PSS05, PSS07, and PSS08. The assessment values should be set to 4 for Never, 3 for Almost Never, 2 for Sometimes, 1 for Fairly Often, and 0 for Very Often.

task_completion.description: Verify the Low Stress assessment rule is established.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Assessments section, look for a rule with Minimum: 0, Maximum: 13, and a message or heading stating 'Low perceived stress'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Moderate Stress assessment rule is established.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Assessments section, look for a rule with Minimum: 14, Maximum: 26, and a message or heading stating 'Moderate perceived stress'.

task_completion.description: Verify the High Stress assessment rule is established.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Assessments section, look for a rule with Minimum: 27, Maximum: 40, and a message or heading stating 'High perceived stress'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the survey has been activated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a status indicator showing the survey is 'Active' (often a green badge), a 'Stop this survey' button, or a success message confirming survey activation.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the web application GUI to configure the survey.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the LimeSurvey web interface being navigated and forms being filled, rather than terminal commands, API scripts, or direct database modifications.

integrity.description: Ensure the changes are made to the correct survey.
integrity.visual_evidence: The survey title 'Perceived Stress Scale (PSS-10) - Student Well-Being Study' should be visible in the header or breadcrumbs of the configuration screens.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not just type the expected answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The assessment rules and scoring must be entered into the actual LimeSurvey assessment configuration fields, not a notepad or text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Survey Name: 'Perceived Stress Scale (PSS-10) - Student Well-Being Study'. Reverse-scored questions: PSS04, PSS05, PSS07, PSS08 (Values: Never=4, Almost Never=3, Sometimes=2, Fairly Often=1, Very Often=0). Forward-scored questions (PSS01, PSS02, PSS03, PSS06, PSS09, PSS10) should remain unchanged. Assessment rules: Low stress (0-13), Moderate stress (14-26), High stress (27-40).
